◆ getTemporary()

MDNodeFwdDecl * MDNode::getTemporary ( LLVMContext & Context,
ArrayRef< Metadata * > MDs )
static

Return a temporary MDNode.

For use in constructing cyclic MDNode structures. A temporary MDNode is not uniqued, may be RAUW'd, and must be manually deleted with deleteTemporary.

Definition at line 735 of file Metadata.cpp.

References llvm::MDNodeFwdDecl::get().

Referenced by CloneAliasScopeMetadata(), llvm::MDBuilder::createAnonymousAARoot(), llvm::DIBuilder::createCompileUnit(), llvm::DIBuilder::createFunction(), llvm::DIBuilder::createReplaceableForwardDecl(), llvm::DIBuilder::createTempFunctionFwdDecl(), llvm::DIBuilder::createTempGlobalVariableFwdDecl(), llvm::BitcodeReaderMDValueList::getValueFwdRef(), mapDistinctNode(), and mapUniquedNode().

◆ isDistinct()

bool llvm::MDNode::isDistinct ( ) const
inline

Check if node is distinct.

Distinct nodes are not uniqued, and will not be returned by MDNode::get().
